changeSet.author: Rushan Ramazanov
changeSet.sql: CREATE TABLE ma_user_health_profiles ( id UUID NOT NULL PRIMARY KEY, user_id UUID UNIQUE REFERENCES ma_users (id), weight FLOAT NOT NULL, chronic_conditions JSONB DEFAULT '[]'::jsonb NOT NULL, health_features JSONB DEFAULT '[]'::jsonb NOT NULL, allergies JSONB DEFAULT '[]'::jsonb NOT NULL, created_by TEXT NOT NULL, created_date TIMESTAMP NOT NULL, modified_by TEXT NOT NULL, modified_date TIMESTAMP NOT NULL );

changeSet.author: Rushan Ramazanov
changeSet.sql: CREATE TABLE ma_medical_views_history ( id UUID NOT NULL PRIMARY KEY, user_id UUID REFERENCES ma_users (id), medical_id UUID REFERENCES ma_medicals (id), viewed_at TIMESTAMP NOT NULL );

changeSet.author: Rushan Ramazanov
changeSet.sql: ALTER TABLE ma_users ADD COLUMN email_verified BOOLEAN DEFAULT FALSE;
changeSet.rollback: ALTER TABLE ma_users DROP COLUMN IF EXISTS email_verified;

changeSet.author: Rushan Ramazanov
changeSet.sql: ALTER TABLE ma_users ADD COLUMN privacy_consent BOOLEAN DEFAULT FALSE;
changeSet.rollback: ALTER TABLE ma_users DROP COLUMN IF EXISTS privacy_consent;

changeSet.author: Rushan Ramazanov
changeSet.sql: CREATE TABLE ma_email_verifications ( id UUID NOT NULL PRIMARY KEY, user_id UUID REFERENCES ma_users (id), expired TIMESTAMP NOT NULL, status TEXT NOT NULL );

changeSet.author: Rushan Ramazanov
changeSet.sql: ALTER TABLE ma_email_verifications ADD COLUMN verification_token UUID NOT NULL;
changeSet.rollback: ALTER TABLE ma_email_verifications DROP COLUMN IF EXISTS verification_token;

changeSet.author: Rushan Ramazanov
changeSet.sql: UPDATE ma_users SET user_consent=true, email_verified=true, privacy_consent=true WHERE id = 'ffa1fcc4-537c-438d-b1c8-ce08ff47ff6c';
changeSet.rollback: UPDATE ma_users SET user_consent=false, email_verified=false, privacy_consent=false WHERE id = 'ffa1fcc4-537c-438d-b1c8-ce08ff47ff6c';
